The '''cyperill tree''' was a plant native to [[Chad/Legends|Chad]]. [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] lived in these trees due to the turbulent nature of their [[Planet/Legends|planet]], such as avoiding [[Tsunami/Legends|tsunamis]].<ref name="EGAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
